posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I would like to use sum in automation and I don’t see any easy to do this. For example I would to be able to do this:
When sum of this board is superior to x
And only if status is this
Then do this

It is frustrating not to be able to use numbers as a trigger !!

Is Monday.com planning to work on this?
That would be very beneficial in many situations for many industries

  • manage stocks for a shop, a factory
  • reward employees in a sale team
  • …

Thanks for considering this.

Best regards,
